title: Error when assigning value to component variable in JS
symptom: The user encounters a 'Invalid left-hand side in assignment' error when trying to change a component variable's value using JavaScript.
applies_when: Using JavaScript to assign a value to a component variable
not_this_if: The assignment works for non-component variables
The variable chain returns a valid variable
root_cause: This error occurs when the JavaScript code attempts to assign a value to an invalid target, often due to the variable being undefined or not properly referenced in the context of component variables.
fix_steps: Ensure the variable being assigned is correctly defined and accessible
Use the correct method for updating component variables, such as context.component.methods.updateVariable
Refactor the code to handle cases where the variable may be undefined
agent_instruction: Check the variable definition and use the appropriate method for component variable assignment.
